CheckTitle: Review Conditional Access policies with excessive user exclusions
Description: Flags CA policies that exclude more than 5 individual users or groups. Excessive exclusions weaken the policy's effectiveness and create coverage gaps.
Risk: Each excluded user or group is a potential bypass vector. Attackers who compromise excluded accounts are not subject to otherwise mandatory controls like MFA or device compliance.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review and minimize exclusions. Use dedicated break-glass accounts and groups rather than individual user exclusions.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
